title: Generating a Product Description
scenario: Write a prompt to generate a product description for a new smartphone. The description should include the phone's features (e.g., 'high-quality camera', 'long battery life', 'water-resistant'). The description should be in a specific format (e.g., 'Introducing the new [phone name], featuring [feature 1], [feature 2], and [feature 3].').
constraints: Must include the specified features in the description

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated prompt adheres to the specified constraints
Check if the generated description includes the specified features
Check if the generated description is in the specified format
